name: Mexican Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve instant beef bouillon granules in hot water and tomato sauce.
2. Combine the mixture with bottled hot pepper sauce and cold water.
3. Pound meat on both sides with a meat mallet; sprinkle with salt, garlic salt, and pepper.
4. Unwrap tamales and place them in the bowl. Break up tamales slightly with a fork and spread over the steaks.
5. Roll each steak jelly roll style, starting with the short side; tie or skewer securely.
6. Place the meat rolls in a crockery cooker.
7. Cook on low heat setting for 8 to 10 hours.
8. Lift out the meat rolls and remove strings or skewers.
9. Pour the cooking liquid into a saucepan and skim off excess fat.
10. Blend cold water with cornstarch and stir into the liquid.
11. Cook until thickened and bubbly, then spoon over the meat.
12. Sprinkle cheese atop each roll.
